title: HirQuery-based staged analysis traversal
body:
Removed an unused traversal module and refactored **staged analysis** to traverse HIR via **`HirQuery`**—a single query API for parent/child/sibling navigation during rules.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `pekan`
- **Commit:** [`0de5fa0`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/pekan/commit/0de5fa0)
- **Subject:** Remove unused traversal module and refactor staged analysis to use HirQuery for HIR traversal
- **Completed:** 2026-02-28

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.0 (Pecan prototype)
- **Workstream:** `compiler-analysis`
- **Deliverable:** `v00-analysis-foundation`

## Relation
`HirQuery` became the canonical traversal surface for semantic passes, replacing one-off walkers and aligning with the phase-indexed HIR model. Informed later Beskid analyze/normalize/type passes on one typed-HIR spine.
